title: Scientific English — Methods and Findings
description: Vocabulary and structure for describing experiments and research findings.
summary_pt_br: Inglês científico: voz passiva, linguagem hedging ('sugere'), verbos precisos (observed, measured).

scenes.subtitle_en: Vocabulary and structure for describing experiments and research findings.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Inglês científico: voz passiva, linguagem hedging ('sugere'), verbos precisos (observed, measured).

scenes.text_en: Vocabulary and structure for describing experiments and research findings. Today's focus: scientific english — methods and findings. Samples were collected from twenty different locations.
scenes.text_pt: Inglês científico: voz passiva, linguagem hedging ('sugere'), verbos precisos (observed, measured). Foco de hoje: scientific english — methods and findings. Amostras foram coletadas de 20 locais diferentes.

scenes.title: Scientific English — Methods and Findings
scenes.body_en: Scientific English uses passive voice ('samples were collected'), hedging ('the data suggests'), and precise verbs (observed, measured, calculated, compared).
scenes.body_pt: Inglês científico: voz passiva, linguagem hedging ('sugere'), verbos precisos (observed, measured).

examples.en: Samples were collected from twenty different locations.
examples.pt: Amostras foram coletadas de 20 locais diferentes.

examples.en: The data suggests a correlation between temperature and growth.
examples.pt: Os dados sugerem correlação entre temperatura e crescimento.

examples.en: Further research is needed to confirm these findings.
examples.pt: Mais pesquisa é necessária pra confirmar esses achados.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Scientific English — Methods and Findings

exercise.question: Complete: "Samples were ___ from twenty different locations."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Samples were collected from twenty different locations."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Amostras foram coletadas de 20 locais diferentes.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
The data suggests a correlation between temperature and growth.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "The data suggests a correlation between temperature and growth."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Os dados sugerem correlação entre temperatura e crescimento.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Scientific English — Methods and Findings — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre scientific english — methods and findings. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Maya, state your hypothesis in one sentence.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How did you collect your samples?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Samples were collected from three reef sites.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The data suggests a weak positive correlation.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Not yet; more data is required.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, our protocol is fully documented.

scenes.title: The lab meeting
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize Maya's hypothesis and findings. Include at least three scientific verbs.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Maya presented her first research poster to a small audience of university scientists and peers.

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: Samples were collected from three reef sites over the course of a twelve-week period.

paragraphs.speaker: Professor
paragraphs.en: Your hypothesis was that warmer water accelerates coral growth, correct?

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: The data suggests a weak but consistent positive correlation across all three sites.

paragraphs.speaker: Professor
paragraphs.en: Further research is needed before we can call this finding statistically significant.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Real science, Maya had learned, sounds less like certainty and more like disciplined curiosity.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Scientific English — Methods and Findings". Vocabulary and structure for describing experiments and research findings. Samples were collected from twenty different locations. The data suggests a correlation between temperature and growth. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Scientific English — Methods and Findings". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.explanation: She says: "Scientific English — Methods and Findings".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Scientific English — Methods and Findings".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
